texto: My aloneness had never bothered me
autor: I hadn't even been aware of it. But now it overwhelmed me. The awareness washed over me with painful sharpness and deep grief. Now that I had company.
explicacao: Citação de I hadn't even been aware of it. But now it overwhelmed me. The awareness washed over me with painful sharpness and deep grief. Now that I had company. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “My aloneness had never bothered me” articula amor, linda-olsson, the-memory-of-love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como the-memory-of-love.
